internal_claim_text: Network effects create durable moats in platform businesses.
external_author: Geoffrey Parker; Marshall Van Alstyne; Sangeet Paul Choudary
external_body: Platform businesses leverage network effects to create value that grows with each additional participant. The key insight is that platforms invert the traditional firm by creating value outside rather than inside the organization. Network effects are not automatic; they require careful orchestration of interactions between producers and consumers.
